description_long: This is a classic men's oxford dress shoe crafted from smooth, tan-brown leather with a subtle sheen. The upper features elegant stitching details along the quarters and a cap toe design, complemented by a standard lace-up closure with four eyelets on each side. The shoe has a low, stacked heel and a slightly rounded toe, providing a formal yet versatile appearance suitable for urban environments. The interior appears to be lined with a darker material, likely for comfort and durability, and the sole is made from a darker, sturdy material, possibly rubber or leather. The overall construction is sleek and refined, with a focus on both style and practicality. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior.
description: A tan-brown leather oxford dress shoe with cap toe, elegant stitching, and a standard lace-up closure, featuring a low stacked heel and smooth finish.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the cap toe, lace-up closure, and detailed stitching along the upper.
description_view_1: Side and rear view highlighting the heel, quarter stitching, and the smooth transition from upper to sole.
description_view_2: Rear angled view focusing on the heel, back seam, and interior lining.
description_view_3: Opposite side and front view displaying the lace area, cap toe, and clean side profile.
